tasks.subject: Task 1: Core session-cookie scoping (pkg/session) + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Change the session cookie to Path=/ with a deployment-conditional name + Secure, read it back by the same resolved name — within pkg/session, callers untouched.

**Files:**
- Modify: pkg/session/middleware.go
- Test: pkg/session/middleware_test.go (create)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- FreshSessionCookie: Path=/, SameSite=Lax, HttpOnly, no Domain
- HTTPS deployment → name __Host-prohibitorum_session, Secure=true
- HTTP/empty origin → plain prohibitorum_session, Secure=false
- ClearedSessionCookie matches Fresh on name+path+attrs, MaxAge=-1
- LoadSession reads via resolved name
- go build/vet + pkg/session tests green

**Steps:** Add secureCookies/sessionCookieName/SessionCookieNameFor; rewrite Fresh/ClearedSessionCookie (Path=/, conditional name, cfg-driven Secure, r→_); LoadSession read via SessionCookieNameFor(cfg); new middleware_test.go both modes; build+vet; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/session/middleware.go", "pkg/session/middleware_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/session/... -v && mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Path=/ SameSite=Lax HttpOnly no-Domain", "https → __Host- name + Secure", "http/empty → plain name, no Secure", "Cleared matches Fresh, MaxAge=-1", "LoadSession reads resolved name", "build/vet/pkg-session tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Resolve conditional name at logout-read + OpenAPI scheme (pkg/server)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Logout cookie read and OpenAPI security scheme use the resolved deployment-conditional name.

**Files:**
- Modify: pkg/server/handle_auth.go:280
- Modify: pkg/server/server.go (registerSecurityScheme + callers ~127, ~183)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- handleLogoutHTTP reads via sessstore.SessionCookieNameFor(s.config)
- registerSecurityScheme takes cookieName; constructor passes SessionCookieNameFor(config), NewHuma passes base SessionCookieName
- go build/vet + pkg/server tests green

**Steps:** Update logout read; change registerSecurityScheme(api, cookieName); update both callers; build/vet/test; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_auth.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/server/... && mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["logout reads SessionCookieNameFor", "registerSecurityScheme threads cookieName at both callers", "build/vet/server tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Drop smoke manual cookie re-attach (behavioral proof)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove manual cookie re-attach in all 5 OIDC/SAML smoke helpers; let cookiejar auto-send the Path=/ cookie; add root-path proof assertion.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/smoke/main.go (authorizeWithSession, ssoLocation; remove sessionCookieForOIDC; add assertSessionCookieAtRoot + call; fix comments)
- Modify: cmd/smoke/saml_mock.go (ssoPostForm, ssoInit, ssoWithSession; fix comments)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No helper calls sessionCookieForOIDC/req.AddCookie; each sets Jar: c.jar
- sessionCookieForOIDC deleted (no refs)
- assertSessionCookieAtRoot called once before first authorizeWithSession
- stale Path=/api/prohibitorum comments corrected
- Full smoke 1–111 green, SMOKE_EXIT=0

**Steps:** Convert 3 saml_mock + 2 main helpers (drop attach, add Jar: c.jar); delete sessionCookieForOIDC; add assertSessionCookieAtRoot; call before first authorize; fix comments; build + run full smoke; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/main.go", "cmd/smoke/saml_mock.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go build ./cmd/smoke/... && ! grep -rn sessionCookieForOIDC cmd/smoke", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 helpers use Jar: c.jar, no manual attach", "sessionCookieForOIDC removed", "assertSessionCookieAtRoot called once", "stale comments fixed", "full smoke green SMOKE_EXIT=0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Close v0.6 architectural finding in AUDIT.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mark the cookie-path-vs-route finding resolved with fix, spec ref, verification, and carried-forward POST-binding caveat.

**Files:**
- Modify: AUDIT.md (~line 615 finding block)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Finding marked resolved; names fix (Path=/ + conditional __Host-/Secure); references spec; notes verification (unit tests + unmasked smoke + assertSessionCookieAtRoot)
- D2 limitation carried forward (SAML POST-binding cross-site = /login bounce once)
- No false real-browser claim

**Steps:** Rewrite finding block as resolved entry; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AUDIT.md"], "verifyCommand": "rg -n 'RESOLVED.*session-cookie scoping' AUDIT.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["finding marked resolved with fix + spec ref + verification", "D2 POST-binding caveat carried forward", "no false real-browser claim"]}
```
